build.stdout:
rm -rf main main.o reference.o

g++  -std=c++17 -Wall  -O3 -fopenmp -c main.cpp -o main.o
g++  -std=c++17 -Wall  -O3 -fopenmp -c reference.cpp -o reference.o
g++  -std=c++17 -Wall  -O3 -fopenmp main.o reference.o -o main

verification.details: Pattern 'PASS' NOT found in stdout. Compares GPU tissue simulation output against CPU reference; prints PASS or FAIL
